issues.message: Link is missing an accessible name

evidence.reason: Link has no usable text, aria-label, title, or image alt text.

issues.suggested_fix: Add descriptive link text that explains the link destination or action.

rule.title: Link missing accessible name
rule.why_it_matters: Screen reader users hear an empty or meaningless link and cannot decide whether to follow it.
rule.manual_review_notes: Links wrapping only images need useful alt text on the image.
rule.static_check_limitations: Static HTML cannot detect link names injected by JavaScript.

issues.message: Link is missing an accessible name

evidence.snippet: <a href="#" class="dropdown-toggle" id="dropdownMenuSearch" data-toggle="dropdown" aria-haspopup="true" aria-expanded="true">
evidence.reason: Link has no usable text, aria-label, title, or image alt text.

issues.suggested_fix: Add descriptive link text that explains the link destination or action.

rule.title: Link missing accessible name
rule.why_it_matters: Screen reader users hear an empty or meaningless link and cannot decide whether to follow it.
rule.manual_review_notes: Links wrapping only images need useful alt text on the image.
rule.static_check_limitations: Static HTML cannot detect link names injected by JavaScript.

evidence.reason: Link text is generic and does not explain the destination or action.

issues.suggested_fix: Use descriptive link text like "Download scholarship guidelines" instead of "click here."

rule.title: Link text is too generic
rule.why_it_matters: Students who navigate by a list of links hear 'click here' with no context and cannot tell links apart.
rule.manual_review_notes: Surrounding text may add context visually, but the link should still make sense on its own.
rule.static_check_limitations: The check only matches a small list of common generic phrases.

evidence.reason: Link text is generic and does not explain the destination or action.

issues.message: Image is missing useful alt text

evidence.reason: Image is missing useful alt text.

issues.suggested_fix: Add alt text that describes the image purpose, or mark decorative images as presentation.

rule.title: Image missing useful alt text
rule.why_it_matters: Students using screen readers miss the image content entirely, which can hide instructions, diagrams, or required information.
rule.manual_review_notes: Confirm whether the image is informative or decorative; only a human can judge if existing alt text is actually useful.
rule.static_check_limitations: Static checks cannot judge alt text quality, only whether it exists.

limitations: This prototype runs static HTML checks plus a basic keyboard interaction audit.
It does not replace a full human accessibility audit.
Browser mode does not simulate a full screen reader, and accessible names are estimated.
Low-vision browser checks are conservative heuristics and require manual review.
Browser mode approximates keyboard interaction but does not simulate a full screen reader.
Accessible names are estimated and require manual review.
Low-vision checks use browser-computed styles and conservative heuristics.
Rendered color contrast checks do not prove full WCAG conformance.
Zoom/reflow uses a narrow viewport approximation rather than a full zoom compliance test.
Focus indicator detection may miss custom focus styles.

ai_scout.summary: Possible accessibility barriers found in navigation and image alt text

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some links may not have descriptive text for users who rely on assistive technologies
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: This could make it difficult for users to understand the purpose or destination of the link
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Links with missing or generic text were detected

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some images may be missing alternative text, which could impact users who rely on screen readers or have low vision
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: This could make it difficult for users to understand the content or purpose of the image
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Images with missing alt text were detected

outreach_notes: The American Council on Education website may have accessibility barriers that could impact users with disabilities. A human review of the site is recommended to ensure that all users can access and navigate the content.
limitations: AI Scout findings are suggestions and need human review.
AI Scout output is not a confirmed accessibility finding.
AI Scout does not determine legal compliance, WCAG compliance, or screen-reader behavior.
AI Scout output is not a needs human review accessibility finding.
